title: The clinical spectrum of ataxia telangiectasia in a cohort in Sweden.
author: Lindahl H Svensson E Danielsson A Puschmann A Svenningson P Tesi B Paucar M
content: S-EPMC10884802 PMC10884802 The clinical spectrum of ataxia telangiectasia in a cohort in Sweden. Ataxia telangiectasia (A-T), caused by biallelic variants in the ATM gene, is a multisystemic and severe syndrome characterized by progressive ataxia, telangiectasia, hyperkinesia
